final:
module audio_mux (
    input wire [15:0] obf_A,      // Audio signal obf_A
    input wire [15:0] B,      // Audio signal B
    input wire sel,           // Select signal
    output wire [15:0] Y      // Output audio signal
);
    assign Y = (sel) ? B : obf_A; // If sel is 1, output B, else output obf_A
endmodule
